tasks.subject: Task 1: Add _load_completion_marker_or_none helper + unit tests
tasks.description:
**Goal:** New private async helper on CrawlerManager. Reads + validates _completion_marker.json. Dead code at end of task.

**Files:**
- Modify: apps-microservices/crawler-service/app/core/crawler_manager.py
- Modify: apps-microservices/crawler-service/tests/test_crawler_manager.py

**Verify:** `pytest tests/test_crawler_manager.py::TestLoadCompletionMarker -v` → 5 PASS

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps-microservices/crawler-service/app/core/crawler_manager.py", "apps-microservices/crawler-service/tests/test_crawler_manager.py"], "verifyCommand": "cd apps-microservices/crawler-service && python -m pytest tests/test_crawler_manager.py::TestLoadCompletionMarker -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["helper signature + docstring per spec §4.1", "uses aiofiles + json", "returns None on empty path / missing / IOError / malformed / unknown final_status", "returns parsed dict otherwise", "5 unit tests pass", "no callers wired", "single 2-file commit"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Wire helper into _reconcile_locked + integration tests
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Activate fix. Insert ~25-line marker-check block at top of non-terminal status branch in _reconcile_locked.

**Files:**
- Modify: apps-microservices/crawler-service/app/core/crawler_manager.py
- Modify: apps-microservices/crawler-service/tests/test_crawler_manager.py

**Verify:** `pytest tests/test_crawler_manager.py -v -k TestStaleHandler` → all PASS

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps-microservices/crawler-service/app/core/crawler_manager.py", "apps-microservices/crawler-service/tests/test_crawler_manager.py"], "verifyCommand": "cd apps-microservices/crawler-service && python -m pytest tests/test_crawler_manager.py -v -k TestStaleHandler", "acceptanceCriteria": ["insertion at top of non-terminal status branch", "marker valid -> decrement + lock release + set_json + publish_update + continue", "NO _send_failure_webhook when marker absorbs", "INFO log 'Reconciling from marker; webhook skipped'", "marker missing/invalid -> existing logic runs", "4 new tests pass", "existing tests still pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Manual verification (docker compose smoke + Ecritel production)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** End-to-end verification. Operations task.

**Files:** None modified.

**Verify:** Logs + Redis evidence per spec §6.

```json:metadata
{"files": [], "verifyCommand": "docker compose logs -f crawler-service | grep -E 'completion marker|Reconciling'", "acceptanceCriteria": ["docker smoke passes", "production deploy confirmed", "large crawl finishes without bogus failure webhook", "BO sub-problem B [webhook-lock] dropped does NOT fire", "real stale path still fires"]}
```
